docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-07-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO PAY $100.00 TO PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE JAN 20, 2010. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $100.00 ON THE 3RD OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING FEBRUARY 3, 2010 UNTIL REMAINING BALANCE OF $1,186.90 IS PAID. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE A PAYMENT, THEN JUDGMENT FOR REMAINING AMOUNT WILL BE ENTERED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SUANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-04-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT APPEARED AND STATED SHE HAS MADE FOUR PAYMENTS OF $100.00 TO PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM" DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,686.90 FILED BY SANDOVAL, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SUANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO FILED BY SANDOVAL, IRMA ZEPEDA, SUANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SUANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, IRMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, SUANY $586.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $646.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
